summary: Iteration 77 - PostViewer, i18n, and backend stability testing. All 12 backend API tests PASSED (100%). PostViewer component fully functional with all features working: modal open/close, like, bookmark, comment, navigation arrows, Escape key. i18n language switching verified working (ES/EN).

minor.issue: 404 errors for missing profile images in posts grid - non-blocking

issues: Some post images show as red placeholder - likely missing Cloudinary image URLs

passed_tests: GET /api/health - returns status:ok, db:connected
GET /api/config/locale - returns countries, languages, currencies
GET /api/users/{user_id}/profile - returns user profile with stats
GET /api/users/{user_id}/posts - returns user posts
GET /api/posts/{post_id}/comments - returns post comments
POST /api/posts/{post_id}/like - like toggle works (returns liked:true/false)
POST /api/posts/{post_id}/bookmark - bookmark toggle works (returns bookmarked:true/false)
POST /api/posts/{post_id}/comments - add comment works
GET /api/feed - returns scored feed posts
GET /api/feed?country=ES - country filter works with product_available_in_country
PUT /api/user/locale - language update works
GET /api/users/user_test123/posts - returns 7 posts for test user
Frontend PostViewer modal opens on post click
Frontend PostViewer close button (X) works
Frontend PostViewer like button toggles correctly
Frontend PostViewer bookmark button works
Frontend PostViewer comment input and submission works
Frontend PostViewer next navigation arrow works
Frontend PostViewer prev navigation arrow works
Frontend PostViewer Escape key closes modal
Frontend i18n language selector works (ES/EN switch verified)
Frontend user profile page loads with posts grid and tabs
critical_code_review_comments: PostViewer component is well-implemented with all required features
data-testid attributes properly added for all interactive elements
Keyboard navigation (Escape key, arrow keys) working correctly
i18n race condition fixed - language context syncs with i18n instance
MongoDB connection pooling configured with proper timeouts
Global error handler prevents unhandled crashes (520 errors)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 7 posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 verified: 1) PostViewer modal fully functional on user profile pages - click post to open, X or Escape to close, like/bookmark/comment/share all working, prev/next navigation working. 2) i18n language switching works (ES/EN) without displaying raw translation keys - race condition fixed. 3) Health check returns db:connected. 4) Social routes all working: /users/{id}/profile, /users/{id}/posts, /posts/{id}/comments, /posts/{id}/like, /posts/{id}/bookmark. Test user user_test123 has 7 posts for PostViewer testing.
